xml.introduction: The episode starts with Finn and Jake walking away from an unknown, burning city

line.dialogue: Singing Baby!
Ooo!
Singing I know what you need.
What's that?
Singing You want your little baby socks, for your little baby feet.
Woo!
Singing Baby!
Yeah?
Singing I know what you crave.
Oh, yeah? What's that?
Singing You want to poop your pants all day long. Well, baby behave!
Hey, how can you sing like that, dude?
Remember when I swallowed that little computer?
Oh, yeah.

line.stage: Finn and Jake arrive at a small house and drop off fruits and a string of sausages at the doorstep

line.dialogue: Alright, Stanley. You and your family are safe... Again...
Seriously, Stanley. For a watermelon you get into trouble way more often than you should.

line.stage: Finn and Jake are walking across the Grass Lands and Jake is whistling
A creature rolls up behind them, whistling and knocks Jake off his feet

line.dialogue: W-whoa!
What the... Shmow-zow! Look at that!
That... is the most adorable thing I have ever seen. And he loves your baby song. Sing some more of it, dude.
Alright. Singing Baby! You lookin' so good. You lookin' like you might... want some baby food.

line.stage: The creature is dancing along to the song

line.dialogue: Keep it going, man! Laughs
Singing Baby! You lookin' so fine. You lookin' like you might... just start cryin'.
Laughs Yeah!
Dude! This guy... is a pal for life! It looks like he's got two jiggly bellies stuck together.
I've got that on my back. I call it my butt.

line.stage: The creature jiggles Jake's butt

line.dialogue: Whoa!
Laughs He's the Jiggler.
Laughs You are the best thing ever. Let's take the Jiggler back to the house and just stick him by our bed so we can wake up...
Next to a little dancing guy every morning!

line.stage: Finn, Jake and the Jiggler walk towards the Tree Fort

line.dialogue: Singing I gotta tuck you in, girl. I gotta sing you sweet melodies about babies. Yeah!
Little baby feet!

line.stage: The scene changes to inside the Tree Fort

line.dialogue: Carrying the Jiggler on his back Welcome to your new home. Feast your eyes on... everything!

line.stage: Finn grunts and tears a toothbrush in half, vertically

line.dialogue: What are you doing?
Splitting my toothbrush in half, so he can use half.
Handing half to the Jiggler Here you go. It's for your teeth.
Mimes brushing his teeth Like this.

line.stage: The Jiggler swishes the toothbrush around the inside of its mouth

line.dialogue: Yeah! You got it.
Enough hygiene. Putting a record into a phonograph Let's get to it!

line.stage: Music plays and the Jiggler begins to dance while holding its toothbrush

line.dialogue: Yeah! Toothbrush dance. Laughs This is cool!

line.stage: They all start dancing together, Finn and Jake copying the Jiggler's moves
Jake breaks a table in half while dancing

line.dialogue: Flipping the freezer over Yeah!

line.stage: Finn and Jake break more objects while dancing and laughing
The scene cuts to night-time

line.dialogue: Nodding his head Dance... dance... Yawn dance... Snapping upright I'm not tired! How about you, Jake?

line.stage: Jake is sleeping on the floor

line.dialogue: Grabbing the Jiggler and climbing the ladder Maybe we should go upstairs.
Placing the Jiggler in his bed You can have the comfiest spot on the bed. Goodnight. Whistles

line.stage: Finn blows out the candle and curls up on the end of his bed
The scene changes to morning, where Jake is making tea

line.dialogue: Mornin', Jake!
Yawns Mornin'.
Are you ready to get down? Synthesizer voice Let's get this party started!
Laughs Yeah, ok.
Where's the little guy?
Pointing with his cup Over there.

line.stage: The Jiggler is face-down on the back of a bench

line.dialogue: Hey, pal. You ready to cut loose? Wake and shake, buddy. Let's do this thing! Whistles
Slam-a-cow! That fool looks rumped.
What do you mean?
Well, look at him. He's all limp... and weird.

Aww... I bet he just needs some breakfast after a night of extraordinary jiggling. Hey! Let's combine everything we can find in the kitchen... and have the Jiggler drink it! That'll wake him up! And then we can... Get Synthesizer voice doooowwwn!
He doesn't want to drink that goop, man.
Then let's just give him some, uh... purple whatevers.
You mean the grapes?
Yeah. Whatever.

line.stage: Finn feeds the Jiggler a grape and the Jiggler swallows it

line.dialogue: Hey! I think he's diggin' it!

line.stage: The Jiggler's body contorts and it makes a strange humming noise

line.dialogue: That doesn't sound good.

line.stage: The Jiggler's body violently changes color and shape
The Jiggler stops contorting and changing color

line.dialogue: Uhh...
Looking at one of the Jiggler's holes as it leaks a pink juice Uh, you think we... think we fed the wrong hole?

line.stage: Jake flips the Jiggler upside-down

line.dialogue: Nah. He just doesn't like purple whatevers. What we need to do is figure out what he likes to eat.
Drawing pictures Here, Jiggler. What kind of food do you like? Meat? Some banana? This looks like corn... I think. Uh... hot dog. Stanley the watermelon.
Showing the drawings to the Jiggler Look! Jake! He likes it!

line.stage: The Jiggler reaches up and pulls the drawings off of the paper

line.dialogue: Gasp Wow!
No way!

line.stage: The Jiggler slurps the drawings into its mouth and eats them

line.dialogue: His favorite food... is drawings! Awesome!
Holy fig, that's awesome! What food are you drawing now?
I'm drawing a picture of you.
Distressed Well, don't feed it me!
Laughs and offers the drawing to the Jiggler Come on. Eat him up, Jiggler!

line.stage: The Jiggler slurps the drawing off of the paper, but Jake pulls him away before he can eat it

line.dialogue: No!

line.stage: The drawing of Jake floats towards them

line.dialogue: Running away with the Jiggler Ahhh! Keep it away! Shoo! Shoo! Screaming
Grabs the drawing Alright. Alright. I got it. Calm down... I'll eat it. Opening his mouth Ahhhhh.
Snatches the drawing away from Finn Dude! You eating me is just as bad as the Jiggler eating me.
Well... You gonna eat yourself, tough guy?
Yes. If that is what must be done.

line.stage: Jake chews the drawing of himself and swallows

line.dialogue: I taste awesome.
Ok. Alright. Now, let's get back to some jiggling!
I'll get the tunes!

line.stage: The Jiggler is shaking and whimpering
Finn and Jake are dancing

line.dialogue: Like this. Yeah! Woo! Come on Jiggler! wiggle and whistle!
Yeah, Jiggler. Go nuts! Go nuts like there's bugs on your butts!

line.stage: The Jiggler, looking sick, shakes its head and then pink juice spurts out of the hole on the top of its head and it collapses

line.dialogue: Whoa!
Gasps Jiggler?
What the heck? What's wrong with him?
Uh... There's nothing wrong with him. We just gotta plug up his holes.

line.stage: Finn sticks his finger into the hole that is gushing juice

line.dialogue: See? That worked. Ready to jiggle again, little guy?

line.stage: Juice gushes from a different hole

line.dialogue: Whoa!
Oh, man...

line.stage: Jake plugs up the hole that is leaking, but another hole starts to leak

line.dialogue: Plugging the new hole with his finger Quick! We gotta plug those holes!

line.stage: Jake walks away and juice gushes all over Finn

line.dialogue: Jake, hurry!
All I could find was your glass eye collection!
What about your eyepatch collection?
Aw, man. They're in mint condition.
Jake!
Running over with glass eyes and eyepatches Alright! Coming!

line.stage: Finn and Jake start plugging up the Jiggler's holes with glass eyes and eyepatches

line.dialogue: One... more... patch! Sigh Finished. Ugh. He looks terrible. Finn, I know you don't want to hear this, but I think we should cut our losses and bring this fella back to where we found him.
We can't just abandon him. Look at him, Jake. He needs us now more than ever. To Jiggler Just need to take better care of you from now on, right little guy?

line.stage: The Jiggler swells and then explodes, spraying pink juice everywhere

line.dialogue: JIGGLER!

line.stage: The Jiggler's body stretches and ricochets in every direction and drapes the inside of the Tree Fort like taffy candy

line.dialogue: Oh... Finn. Ok... Our pet exploded.
Maybe we can... scrape him up! And... eyuhh...
Gasp Oh, holy moly! Don't worry, Jiggler. We'll fix you. Whistles

line.stage: The Jiggler tries to whistle, but only makes weak raspberry noises

line.dialogue: Let's gather him up, Jake. He's all over the place... even between the floorboards!
And the cupboards!
And the galoshes!
I wonder... Where's his heinie?

line.stage: Jake looks over and sees the Jiggler's heinie on their phonograph

line.dialogue: Found it! Come here, you!

line.stage: The Jiggler's heinie jumps away and runs around

line.dialogue: Hey!

line.stage: Finn and Jake gather all of the Jiggler and bring him together

line.dialogue: Come on. Let's put him back together.
Ok.
Squeeze real hard. He's slipping!

line.stage: Finn and Jake hug with the Jiggler in between them

line.dialogue: Got him!

line.stage: The Jiggler gets pressed back into a globular mass

line.dialogue: Well, at least he's all in one piece.

line.stage: The Jiggler collapses

line.dialogue: Sheesh. You think he's dead?
No way! I won't let you die, guy! Not this time.

line.stage: Finn blows into various holes on the Jiggler's head and then kisses it

line.dialogue: Finn. Stop it, man. What are you doing?
I'm kissing him! What do you think? It's all I could think to do.
Just put him down.

line.stage: Finn lays him down and the Jiggler makes kissing motions with its lips
The Jiggler begins leaving many different colored kiss-marks on the floor

line.dialogue: He's kissing colors with his dying breath.

line.stage: The Jiggler has painted a picture with his colored kiss-marks

line.dialogue: I think he's trying to tell us something. Finn, this looks like it could be his Mama Jiggler

line.stage: The Jiggler crawls up to the image of its mother and hugs it, whistling

line.dialogue: We took this child away from its mama, Jake. We're kidnappers and murderers! I just wanted to have fun and jiggle!

Look... Chill out, ok? We can fix this. Check it out. Pointing to a house in the background of the image His mom looks like she's out by Stanley's house... where we found the Jiggler. If we get him back to her, she'll be able to fix him up!
Picking up the Jiggler Then there's no time to spare.

line.stage: The scene changes to the Grass Lands, near where they found the Jiggler

line.dialogue: Holding the Jiggler Shhh. Just hold on a little longer, buddy.

line.stage: There is a whistling sound in the distance

line.dialogue: Did you hear that? Whistling!

line.stage: Finn and Jake enter a cave

line.dialogue: Perpendicular! It's the mama!

line.stage: Mama Jiggler and several babies are sitting and splashing in a pool of pink juice, which is pouring out of Mama Jiggler's holes like a fountain
The Jiggler stretches towards them and gives out a very weak-sounding whistle

line.dialogue: Look! The little guy wants to go home!
Setting the Jiggler down Well. This is it, buddy.
Waving Be well.

line.stage: The Jiggler walks up to Mama Jiggler and she sniffs it; suddenly, the Mama Jiggler then becomes enraged, screeching wildly while strobing rainbow colors

line.dialogue: Running to the Jiggler Hey! Stop that!

line.stage: Finn fends off the enraged Mama Jiggler and carries the weak Jiggler to safety

line.dialogue: I don't understand! That crazy mama almost killed him!
He feels cold.
What are we supposed to do now, man? We can't bring him home, or he'll... or he'll...

line.stage: Finn tears up and the Jiggler deflates a little

line.dialogue: Dang it! Why doesn't she love him? I love him! To Jake You love him! It's not fair! Running Ahhhh!
Finn, wait!

line.stage: Finn runs at Mama Jiggler with the weakened baby Jiggler in his arms, but the Mama Jiggler becomes even more angry as she proceeds to attack Finn using her flailing tentacle-like arms

line.dialogue: Mama's supposed to love baby! She's supposed to love baby!
Huh?

line.stage: Jake notices the other babies floating in the pool of pink juice

line.dialogue: Sniffs the air and then himself Oh, man!
It's yours, idiot!

line.stage: Finn jumps up on top of the enraged Mama Jiggler's head and holds the Jiggler up close to her face

line.dialogue: Don't you recognize your own baby?

Stretches his arms, grabbing Finn and pulling him back Finn! I figured it out, dude. It's the juice. The Jiggler needs to smell like its mama's juice. That's how wild animals know what’s going on... and this guy right here is all drained out. We gotta toss it in the soup, brother.
Alright. Ok. To the Jiggler I loved you, baby. I hope you know that.
Tossing the Jiggler at Mama Jiggler Word to your motheeeerrrrr!

line.stage: The Jiggler flies through the air and lands in the pool of juice; It now looks normal and begins to whistle
The Mama Jiggler then picks it up and sniffs it, the Mama Jiggler then finally calms down as she then holds it against her cheek and they both whistle

line.dialogue: Awww...
I'll never kidnap again.
You said it! That was a nightmare.
